title: Athlete Constraints
description: The runtime input that filters which building blocks are valid for a given athlete and context. This is what the athlete provides, not a library item.

equipment.description: Equipment the athlete has reliable access to. Used to filter archetypes and exercises.

equipment_profile.description: Convenience label for common equipment setups. If 'custom', the equipment array is used directly.

days_per_week.description: Number of training days available per week.

session_time_minutes.description: Maximum session length in minutes. Filters out archetypes longer than this value.

training_level.description: Athlete's general training age and capacity. Used for framework selection and prerequisite checking.

injury_flags.description: Active injury or limitation IDs. Any exercise contraindicated with a listed flag is excluded from selection.

avoid_movements.description: Movement pattern IDs to exclude regardless of injury flags. Use for preferences or additional clinical restrictions.

training_phase.description: Current phase of training. Filters available archetypes (e.g. no peaking templates during base phase).

periodization_week.description: Current week within the active phase. Used by progression models to calculate load targets.

fatigue_state.description: Athlete's current accumulated fatigue level. Modifies session intensity and volume. 'overreached' triggers automatic deload.

constraint_priority.description: Marks individual constraints as hard (cannot be violated) or soft (prefer to respect, can override). Defaults to hard if not specified.

notes.description: Free-text notes about this athlete's context. Not used by the algorithm.

weekly_schedule.description: User's weekly training schedule with up to 4 sessions per day. Each session can be rest, short (30-45min), long (60+ min), or mobility (15-20min).

DaySchedule.description: Schedule for a single day with up to 4 session slots

SessionType.description: Session type: rest (no training), short (30-45min), long (60+ min), mobility (15-20min)
